profile.name: Charitha Dissanayaka
profile.aboutText: Pursuing a Computer Science degree with honors at NSBM Green University. Additionally, I am enrolled in a Higher Diploma in Software Engineering at Wayamba University, Kuliyapitiya. I am passionate about developing elegant solutions to complex engineering challenges.

achievements.title: Exquzite  3.0
achievements.description: Thrilled to have been part of the organizing committee for Exquzite 3.0, a dynamic quiz competition around companies, with a special focus on WIA Systems!
achievements.fullText: This event provided a fantastic opportunity to observe WIA Systems in action and connect with the incredible professionals who work there. A big thank you to everyone who helped make this event a success. Looking forward to more such enriching experiences!

achievements.title: Honored at Google Flutter Badging Ceremony
achievements.description: Received the formal Flutter Application Developer credential at the official badging ceremony.
achievements.fullText: The badging ceremony celebrates developers achieving advanced competence in Flutter and multi-platform native structures. Demonstrating robust application development, local state management strategies, and clean architecture patterns.

achievements.title: Oracle Certified Java Developer Achievement
achievements.description: Certified as a professional Java Developer, proving deep competence in object-oriented development and enterprise Java APIs.
achievements.fullText: Validates deep understanding of core Java patterns, concurrent threads, JDBC structures, and modular software designs, establishing foundational skills for robust enterprise application engineering.

achievements.title: Top Rank NSBM Academic Excellence Award
achievements.description: Awarded the Academic Excellence trophy and medal for top-rank performance in the Computer Science honor curriculum.
achievements.fullText: Recognized by the university council for consecutive honors list GPA standing. Validating academic dedication, software research contributions, and consistent leadership in collegiate engineering societies.

projects.title: Travel Trove
projects.description: Developed a responsive full-stack booking system with secure user sessions, dynamic tour exploration, and normalized data management.

projects.title: Learn X
projects.description: Developed a secure, role-based school management app with attendance tracking, MCQ modules, and a normalized 20+ table backend.

projects.title: Fix on Go
projects.description: A well-known global brand of emergency roadside tire repair kits that temporarily seal flat tires so you can keep driving.

services.title: Web Design
services.description: Creating visually stunning, fully responsive, and highly interactive user interfaces tailored to your specific brand identity.

services.title: Software Engineering
services.description: Building reliable, scalable back-end logic, API servers, and system models that ensure smooth app operations.

services.title: Database Solutions
services.description: Designing optimized relational SQL database structures, normalization profiles, and efficient indexing strategies.
